title: Adaptive Orbit Dock — Animated Semi-Circular Navigation

requirements.text: Create a new `OrbitDock` component (frontend/src/components/OrbitDock.tsx) implementing the 'Adaptive Orbit Dock' bottom navigation. Position three icons (Upload, Folders, Mission) on a semi-circular arc at the bottom of the screen. The active icon must always sit at the center-bottom apex of the arc (scale 1.0, opacity 100%, subtle drop-shadow/elevation). The two inactive icons must flank it symmetrically on the arc (scale 0.75–0.85, opacity 50–60%, slight brightness reduction). Semi-circle radius: 60–70px. The dock container must sit 24–32px above the bottom safe area (env(safe-area-inset-bottom)).

quotes: Τοποθέτησε τα 3 εικονίδια σε ημικυκλική διάταξη (semi-circular dock) στο κάτω μέρος της οθόνης.
Το dock να απέχει 24–32px από το κάτω safe area.

acceptanceCriteria: Three icons (Upload, Folders, Mission) are rendered on a semi-circular arc at the screen bottom.
Active icon is always at the center apex of the arc with scale 1.0 and opacity 100%.
Inactive icons are at symmetric arc positions with scale 0.75–0.85 and opacity 50–60%.
The dock is positioned 24–32px above the bottom safe area using env(safe-area-inset-bottom).
Arc radius is visually 60–70px.

requirements.text: Implement swipe-left and swipe-right gesture handling on the OrbitDock. On swipe, icons must animate along the orbital arc path (not a flat horizontal slide) to simulate real circular motion. The transition must use an ease-in-out curve, last 220–260ms, and give a physical sense of rotation around the arc. Implement infinite loop cycling through the three items in both directions.

quotes: Τα εικονίδια να περιστρέφονται πάνω σε ημικυκλική τροχιά.
Να δίνεται αίσθηση πραγματικής κυκλικής κίνησης (όχι απλό horizontal slide).
Να υποστηρίζεται infinite loop εναλλαγή μεταξύ των 3 λειτουργιών.

acceptanceCriteria: Swiping left or right triggers orbital rotation of all three icons along the arc path.
Animation duration is 220–260ms with ease-in-out easing.
Icons follow a curved (not linear) trajectory during the transition.
Cycling is infinite: swiping past Mission wraps back to Upload and vice versa.
Swipe is detected via pointer/touch events (reusing useSwipeGesture hook if appropriate).

requirements.text: Add adaptive feedback to the OrbitDock active state: display a subtle glow arc or underline indicator beneath the active icon, and show a small fade-in label ('Upload', 'Folders', or 'Mission') below the active icon. When a swipe begins, the glow arc and label must fade out smoothly before the rotation animation starts. Include a light momentum effect on the swipe motion.

quotes: Να εμφανίζεται διακριτικό underline ή glow arc κάτω από το ενεργό εικονίδιο.
Να εμφανίζεται μικρό label με fade-in (π.χ. 'Upload', 'Folders', 'Mission').
Να υπάρχει ελαφρύ momentum effect στην κίνηση.

acceptanceCriteria: A subtle glow arc or underline is rendered beneath the active center icon.
A small text label for the active section appears with a fade-in transition.
On swipe initiation, the glow arc and label fade out before/during the rotation.
The rotation animation has a subtle momentum feel (slight overshoot or ease-out deceleration).

requirements.text: Add professional micro-interactions to each dock icon: (1) Upload icon performs a very subtle pulse animation every 8–10 seconds when it is not being interacted with. (2) Folders icon displays a subtle layered-depth visual effect (e.g., a gentle shadow stack). (3) Mission icon plays a very subtle motion micro-animation when it becomes the active center icon. All micro-interactions must be minimal and non-playful.

quotes: Mission: πολύ διακριτικό motion όταν γίνεται active.

acceptanceCriteria: Upload icon subtly pulses (scale or opacity flicker) every 8–10 seconds when idle.
Folders icon has a subtle depth/shadow-stack visual treatment.
Mission icon plays a brief subtle animation each time it transitions to the center active position.
All micro-interactions are understated and professional in character.

requirements.text: Implement reduced-motion mode support in the OrbitDock. When the user's OS/browser has 'prefers-reduced-motion: reduce' set, fall back to a simple horizontal slide transition between icons with no scale transformation and no orbital arc motion. Reuse the existing useReducedMotion hook (frontend/src/hooks/useReducedMotion.ts).

quotes: Υποστήριξη reduced motion mode (fallback: απλό horizontal slide χωρίς scale).

acceptanceCriteria: When prefers-reduced-motion is active, the dock switches to a flat horizontal slide with no scale changes.
The useReducedMotion hook is used to detect the preference.
Orbital arc animation, scale transitions, and micro-interactions are all disabled under reduced motion.

requirements.text: Integrate the OrbitDock into the existing HomePage (frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) and CircularBottomNavigation area, replacing or wrapping the current bottom navigation rendering. The OrbitDock must trigger the exact same section-switching logic (Upload / Folders / Mission) that the existing navigation triggers. No backend logic, data queries, upload flows, folder operations, or mission operations may be altered. Only the visual navigation UI layer changes.

quotes: Χωρίς να αλλάξει καμία λειτουργία, καμία λογική και καμία αρχιτεκτονική της εφαρμογής.
Να επηρεάζεται μόνο το UI navigation layer.

acceptanceCriteria: OrbitDock is rendered at the bottom of the HomePage in place of the previous bottom navigation.
Tapping each icon or swiping navigates to the correct section (Upload, Folders, Mission) using the same state/callback as before.
All Upload, Folders, and Mission section functionality remains completely unchanged.
No backend calls, context providers, query hooks, or data structures are modified.

constraints: Do not modify any backend logic, data models, or Motoko code.
Do not alter the internal functionality of Upload, Folders, or Mission sections.
Do not edit files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Only the navigation UI layer (bottom dock component) may change.
The existing useReducedMotion hook must be reused for motion preference detection.
The existing useSwipeGesture hook should be reused for swipe detection where compatible.
nonGoals: Changing any Upload, Folders, or Mission section content or logic.
Modifying backend actor, queries, or data flow.
Adding new application features or sections.
Changing authentication, actor initialization, or context providers.
Using 3D (Three.js/React Three Fiber) for the dock animation.
